deterministic_issues.text: Non-nominative 'нас' (genitive, VESUM: noun:anim:p:v_rod:pron:pers:1) in M11. Only nominative case allowed before M25.
deterministic_issues.fix: Replace 'нас' (genitive) with its nominative form or use English equivalent.
